In the '''Vaykaaris Uprising''' of [[41 BBY/Legends|41 BBY]], terrorists based<ref name="TCSWE" /> in the [[Vaykaaris system/Legends|Vaykaaris system]],<ref name="TEA" /> in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]], threatened over one hundred [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the region. A dozen [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] were brought in aboard the [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrilan]] [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] [[FarStar|''Freedom's Messenger'']] to settle the dispute, and ultimately resolved the situation.<ref name="TCSWE" />
